title: galeopsis galeobdolon var. montanum
intro: Galeopsis galeobdolon var. montanum, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Wood Betony include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating headaches and migraines, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Wood Betony typically involve infusions, tinctures, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
